name: Disenchanting
note: Disenchanting runs backwards from a normal recipe: you feed in a MAGIC item (the card's "Components") and get a variable amount of magic powder/essence back, not a fixed crafted result. Since the output is a range rather than a single fixed item+quantity, each card's name describes both possible outputs and their ranges instead of naming one crafted item.

name: Lumberjacking
note: To begin lumberjacking, equip a Lumberjack Axe and right-click on a wood pile. These are often found next to trees. This will give you Wood.

name: Tanning
note: Tanning has no crafted recipes — instead, any tier-appropriate pelt is dropped into a tanning vat and processed directly into scrap material. Each card below shows one pelt-to-scrap conversion rather than a traditional recipe.
